visualGoal: Make a buyer confidently answer 'do I need a PC?' and either size a right-sized mid-range rig or choose the no-PC R50 path — without over-spending. This is a low-product-density explainer: the persuasion carries on a by-software spec table, a PC-vs-no-PC decision tree, and honest setup-tax warnings, NOT on a wall of product cards. Only one product photo (Garmin R50) is genuinely on-topic.

realProductPhotosNeeded.product: Garmin Approach R10 (optional, if we later add an R10 gearpick)
realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: This image IS in verified-product-images.json. It is intentionally NOT embedded — the R10 is discussed as text-only in the no-PC section/decision tree to keep the low-density explainer from padding with product cards. Add a gearpick only if the angle shifts toward a no-PC product roundup.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic home golf simulator bay at dusk in the IgnitionSim dark-green/gold aesthetic, split visual tension: on one side a mid-tower gaming PC glowing beside a hitting mat with a projector throw hitting an impact screen, on the other side an all-in-one launch monitor on a tripod with its own touchscreen and no PC in sight, empty product-overlay plate for a real Garmin R50 photo, curator Nina Brooks gesturing between the two paths, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI text, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake GPU boxes, warped hardware, unreadable tiny spec text, procedural gradient art, invented brand names

infographicPrompts.title: The real PC spec floor by software (2026)
content: GSPro 1080p: RTX 3060/4060 | i5/Ryzen 5 | 16 GB | ~10 GB (course ~1 GB each)
E6 Connect: GTX 1070 min / RTX 3060 smooth | i5-i7 | 8-16 GB | also runs on iPad
FSX Play: RTX 3060+ NVIDIA ONLY | 7th-gen+ Intel | 8-16 GB | AMD GPU NOT supported
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center comparison chart, four software rows, large readable text, golf green/gold, a red lock icon on the FSX AMD row

infographicPrompts.title: Do you actually need a gaming PC?
content: Want GSPro library / E6 / FSX? -> YES, Windows PC + NVIDIA GPU
Running Foresight/Bushnell on FSX? -> build Intel + NVIDIA (no AMD)
Want zero PC? -> Garmin R50 (full sim on-device)
Budget, no PC, casual? -> Garmin R10 (sim runs on phone/tablet)
Only practicing, not playing courses? -> bundled practice app, no PC
infographicPrompts.style: Top-down flowchart / decision tree, numbered branches, IgnitionSim dark-green background with gold nodes, terminal nodes call out PC vs no-PC clearly

infographicPrompts.title: Where to stop spending on a sim PC
content: SKIP: i9 (sims are GPU-bound, not CPU-bound)
SPEND: 1 TB NVMe SSD, right-tier GPU for your projector's resolution
infographicPrompts.style: Two-column 'skip vs spend' card, red X icons vs gold check icons, large text, budget-reassurance tone

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult golf-content curator Nina Brooks in a clean home simulator bay, standing between a glowing mid-tower gaming PC and an all-in-one launch monitor on a tripod, one hand resting on the launch monitor, calm expert energy, practical not fantasy, dark-green/gold IgnitionSim lighting, product-overlay space beside her, 4:5 portrait.

screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.need: A side-by-side of GSPro rendering at 1080p vs 4K Ultra to visually justify the 'match GPU tier to your projector's resolution' point.
screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.notes: Must be a legitimately sourced/licensed GSPro screenshot or an IgnitionSim-captured frame — do NOT fabricate a UI. Flagged optional; the article stands without it.

screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.need: A photo/screenshot of the Garmin R50's built-in touchscreen running Home Tee Hero, to make the 'the launch monitor IS the PC' claim tangible.
screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.notes: Only use a real, licensed/first-party image. Not required for the current draft.
